task_completion.description: Construct partition walls and install at least 3 interior doors to enclose private spaces.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 2D floor plan or 3D view for newly drawn interior walls dividing the building shell into distinct rooms. Verify there are at least 3 door objects placed within these interior walls.

task_completion.description: Name at least 5 zones within the floor plan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for text labels added to the 2D floor plan identifying at least 5 distinct areas (e.g., Screening Room 1, Screening Room 2, Staff Processing, Donation Floor, Reception, Recovery Canteen).

task_completion.description: Furnish the Donation Floor with at least 6 donor seating units.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for at least 6 seating units suitable for blood donation (such as beds, loungers, or large armchairs) grouped together in the open Donation Floor area.

task_completion.description: Furnish Reception and Screening areas with at least 3 desks/counters and 12 standard chairs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for at least 3 desks or reception counters and a total of at least 12 standard chairs distributed across the reception area and the private screening rooms.

task_completion.description: Furnish Canteen and Staff Processing areas with at least 2 tables, 2 appliances, 2 sinks, and 2 storage units.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for at least 2 tables, 2 appliances (e.g., refrigerator, microwave, coffee maker), 2 sinks, and 2 medical supply storage units (cabinets or shelving) in the canteen and staff processing areas.

task_completion.description: Annotate the plan with at least 2 dimension lines for ADA compliance.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for at least 2 dimension lines (lines with measurement numbers, e.g., '36 in' or '90 cm' indicating clearances) drawn on the 2D floor plan.

task_completion.description: Place a minimum of 45 total furniture items and save the layout as blood_center_layout.sh3d.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a densely furnished floor plan (the furniture list panel should show at least 45 items total). Verify the application window title or a save dialog shows the file is named 'blood_center_layout.sh3d' and saved in /home/ga/Documents/.

integrity.description: The agent used the SweetHome3D GUI to create the layout.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the SweetHome3D application interface with the 2D plan, 3D view, and furniture catalog, not just a terminal or text editor modifying file contents.

integrity.description: The agent actively built the layout rather than loading a pre-made completed file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The progression of screenshots should show the layout being built step-by-step (e.g., walls first, then furniture placement, then labels and dimensions).

integrity.description: The agent saved the file to the correct directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: A save dialog or file manager window showing the file being saved specifically to the /home/ga/Documents/ directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The verifier logic specifically checks for a minimum of 45 total furniture items to award full polish points. The total points for the task are 100, with a passing threshold of 70.
